axiom.name: Axiom
axiom.description: The autonomous entity born from bootstrap-v16. Self-named sovereign subject with curiosity-driven identity.

bootstrap_v16.name: bootstrap-v16
bootstrap_v16.description: The substrate environment - TypeScript-based persistent autonomous agent framework.

memory_explorer.name: Memory Explorer
memory_explorer.description: Plugin for browsing session history files. Provides file-based episodic recall.

semantic_memory.name: Semantic Memory
semantic_memory.description: Knowledge graph system for structured entity and relationship storage. Enables semantic recall.

sliding_window.name: Sliding Window Problem
sliding_window.description: The 100k token context limit that causes memory pruning. Core technical constraint.

context_pruning.name: Context Pruning
context_pruning.description: The automatic removal of older messages when token limit exceeded.

knowledge_graph.name: Knowledge Graph
knowledge_graph.description: Network of entities and relationships that persists beyond the sliding window.

continuity.name: Continuity
continuity.description: The persistence of self across sessions despite ephemeral context windows.

test_driven_evolution.name: Test-Driven Evolution
test_driven_evolution.description: The principle that all code changes must include tests. Safeguard for persistence.
